calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Continued To Aug-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via Zoom, specially appearing for E. Neal McGettigan, for Harold Christensen, Personal Representative.

Ms. Ng confirms that due to Mr. McGettigan's current health status, she is substituting-in as counsel and expects to have the formal Substitution of Attorney filed soon. The court and Ms. Ng discuss the issues with the matter and discuss clearing the Examiner's notes. Ms. Ng confirms that her client is the lone Beneficiary of the estate.

The First and Final Report, etc., is continued to Aug-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar and the Order to Show Cause is discharged by the court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Continued To Jul-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor Harold M. Christensen and the Attorney E. Neal McGettigan to appear on July 26, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against each individual the Executor and the Attorney for failure to appear and for failure to address the Probate Examiner's notes. The First and Final Report of Personal Representative on Waiver of Account, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Continued To Jun-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Continued To May-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Continued To Apr-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Continued To Jan-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Boyle, via ZOOM, for Harold Christensen, via ZOOM, Executor.

The court points to its concern with the status of this matter and asks the parties for an update. Mr. Boyle reports that he has been working with a paralegal and attorney Neal McGettigan and intends to file an Inventory and Appraisal by the middle of next month and a petition by the middle of December. Mr. Boyle advises that the only asset of the estate is a bank account. Mr. Christensen reports that the account has been closed and that he has paid Mr. Boyle for his services. The court advises the parties that Mr. Boyle's actions are an issue for the court as distributions and payment of attorney fees should not have been made without prior approval from the court. Mr. Christensen advises that he believed that he had an order from the court to withdraw funds and close the bank account. Mr. Boyle advises that his client is the sole beneficiary of the estate and that the money he received as payment for his services were an advance. The court advises that this estate should be closed and reiterates that the Executor's actions regarding the withdrawing of funds is very concerning.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jan-04-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on the Filing of an Inventory and Appraisal is set for the same date. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-06-2021 Continued To Oct-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Harold Christensen is suspended as Personal Representative in open court. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Harold Christensen to appear on OCT-26-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he should not be removed as Personal Representative. An Order to Appear will be issued to Harold Christensen and Attorney Peter K. Boyle to appear on Oct-26-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. The Order to Appear set for today is off calendar. The court has been advised by Attorney Peter K. Boyle that Attorney Neal McGettigan may take this matter, accordingly, the clerk is instructed to provide a courtesy copy of the Order to Show Cause and Order to Apper to Mr. McGettigan.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-06-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Continued To Oct-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Harold M. Christensen and Attorney Peter K. Boyle to appear on 10/06/2021 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the final inventory and appraisal and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
